TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jack_Albertson, title = Jack_Albertson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jack_Albertson} }

S.FORM: Jack Albertson kawas tay 1907, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 6, Jack Albertson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1981) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Jack Albertson kawas tay 1907, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 6, Jack Albertson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1981) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *aʦ~ʨk alβerts~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *aʦ~ʨk alβerts~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
